name: Chocolate Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift powdered sugar, powdered milk, and cocoa into a bowl.
2. Add raisins, glace cherries, and mixed candied peel to the dry ingredients. Mix until all fruit is well coated.
3. Stir in the vegetable shortening and a few drops of vanilla extract. Mix thoroughly.
4. Line an 8-inch square pan with plastic wrap.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
6. Refrigerate the pan for about 30 minutes, or until firm.
7. Turn out the mixture onto a clean board or cutting mat.
8. Cut the hardened mixture into finger-sized pieces using a sharp knife.
9. Wrap each piece in foil or plastic wrap.
10. Store the chocolate fingers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
